titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in Codex Alexandrinus (GA 02)
GA 02
The New Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Available for noncommercial re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators and the subsequent derivative is licensed as ShareAlike (Creative Commons by-nc-sa)

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John and shared with the Byzantine Text of John published b Roderic L. Mullen in 2007

The IGNTP transcription file was duplicated for the standalone version of the Byzantine Text of John on 9.7.2014. This means that there may be slight discrepancies between the 2007 file used to prepared the Byzantine apparatus and the 2014 transcription in the present file.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. Further information about the transcription procedures followed may be found in the electronic edition of the majuscules at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Placement of ab/gap across page boundaries fixed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0 with manual adjustments.
